prestazioni: Garrett GT2259S turbocharger upgrade for the 1.4L TurboJet (188A4000) engine, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe featuring a 200-cell catalytic converter by Supersprint for optimized spool and Euro 6 compliance

Forged internals kit by JE Pistons (87.5mm bore, 8.5:1 compression) with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods and a billet crankshaft from Manley, supporting 300+ HP on E85 with a Motec M150 ECU managing direct port methanol injection via AEM 340lph pump

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (Ypsilon HF-specific valving) with 24-way adjustable compression/rebound damping, paired with Eibach 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars, and spherical bearing subframe collars by Whiteline for chassis rigidity
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Ypsilon HF-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and ducktail spoiler, finished in PPG 'Bianco Gelato' with matte black accents and custom gold pinstriping by Airbrush Italia

OEM+ headlight retrofit with Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs (H7/H11), sequential LED turn signals by LUX Automotive, and a custom carbon fiber hood featuring a functional NACA duct for intercooler airflow, fabricated by Capristo

Recaro Sportster CS seats (Ypsilon HF-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in Alcantara 'Nero' with red contrast stitching, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter) and custom aluminum shift knob by BMC Racing, anodized in 'Rosso Corsa'
